heading: Hawaii Experimental Tropical Forest
label: 4503b Hawaii Experimental Tropical Forest
notes: Prior ProvisionsA prior was renumbered section 610 and is classified to .section 606 of Pub. L. 101–513section 4505 of this title

children.heading: Forest
children.label: 1 Forest
children.text: The term “Forest” means the Hawaii Experimental Tropical Forest.

children.heading: Governor
children.label: 2 Governor
children.text: The term “Governor” means the Governor of Hawaii.

children.heading: Lands
children.label: 3 Lands
children.text: The term “lands” means lands, waters, and interests in lands and waters.

children.heading: State
children.label: 4 State
children.text: The term “State” means the State of Hawaii.
a model of quality tropical forest management where harvesting on a sustainable yield basis can be demonstrated in balance with natural resource conservation;
a site for research on tropical forestry, conservation biology, and natural resource management; and
a center for demonstration, education, training, and outreach on tropical forestry, conservation biology, and natural resources research and management.

children.heading: Delineation of location of Forest
children.label: c Delineation of location of Forest

children.heading: Identification of lands
children.label: 1 Identification of lands
children.text: The Governor and the Secretary shall identify one or more suitable sites for the Forest in lands within the State. The identification of each site shall be based on scientific, ecological, administrative, and such other factors as the Governor and Secretary consider to be necessary or desirable to achieve the purposes of this section. Each site identified pursuant to the preceding sentence shall be of sufficient size and located so that the site can be effectively managed for Forest purposes.

children.heading: Exterior boundaries
children.label: 2 Exterior boundaries
children.text: The exterior boundaries of the Forest, including the boundaries of all sites identified for Forest purposes, shall be delineated on an official map. The map shall be available for public inspection in the office of the Administrator of the Division of Forestry and Wildlife of the Department of Land and Natural Resources of the State. The Governor and the Secretary may from time to time, by mutual agreement, amend the official map to modify the boundaries of the Forest.

children.label: A
children.text: to administer the Forest in cooperation with the Governor and affected State agencies;

children.label: B
children.text: to make grants and enter into contracts and cooperative agreements with the Federal Government, the government of the State, local governments, corporations, nonprofit organizations and individuals;

children.label: C
children.text: to exercise existing authority with respect to cooperative forestry and research for Forest purposes; and

children.label: i
children.text: for the purposes described in subsection (b);

children.label: ii
children.text: to protect persons within the Forest; and

children.label: iii
children.text: to preserve and protect the resources in the Forest.

children.heading: Land acquisition
children.label: 2 Land acquisition
children.text: The authority in shall be available to the Secretary to carry out this section.section 1643 of this title

children.heading: Statutory construction
children.label: 3 Statutory construction
children.text: Nothing in this section is intended to affect the jurisdiction of the State, both civil and criminal, over any person within the Forest by reason of the establishment of the Forest under this section, except in the case of a penalty for an offense against the United States.
